# Truffle

> Truffle is candidate screening software that lets you design your own screening process — resume screening, one-way video interviews, talent assessments, or all three. AI surfaces evidence. Humans decide.

## Product

- [Pricing](https://www.hiretruffle.com/pricing): $149/month or $99/month billed annually. Self-Serve plan, no per-seat fees, no contracts. 7-day free trial, no credit card required.
- [About Truffle](https://www.hiretruffle.com/about-truffle): Founded 2024. Team, principles, and the belief that recruiters need evidence, not AI verdicts.
- [Book a demo](https://www.hiretruffle.com/demo): 30-minute walkthrough on your real hiring problem, or a 2-minute interactive product tour.

## Solutions

- [Resume screening software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/solution/resume-screening-software)
- [One-way video interview software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/solution/one-way-video-interview-software)
- [Talent assessment software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/solution/talent-assessment-software)
- [AI recruiting software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/solution/ai-recruiting-software)
- [Recruiting automation software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/solution/recruiting-automation-software)
- [High-volume recruiting software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/solution/high-volume-recruiting-software)
- [Pre-employment assessment software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/solution/pre-employment-assessment-software)
- [Recruitment software for small business](https://www.hiretruffle.com/solution/recruitment-software-small-business)
- [Seasonal hiring software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/solution/seasonal-hiring-software)

## Industries

- [Healthcare hiring software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/industry/healthcare-hiring-software)
- [Restaurant hiring software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/industry/restaurant-hiring-software)
- [Retail hiring software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/industry/retail-hiring-software)
- [Staffing agency software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/industry/staffing-agency-software)
- [Startup hiring software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/industry/startup-hiring-software)
- [Campus hiring software](https://www.hiretruffle.com/industry/campus-hiring-software)

## Comparisons and alternatives

- [All Truffle alternatives](https://www.hiretruffle.com/alternative)
- [All hiring tool comparisons](https://www.hiretruffle.com/compare)
- [Customer stories](https://www.hiretruffle.com/customers)

## Integrations

- [All integrations](https://www.hiretruffle.com/integrations): Ashby, Breezy HR, Workable, Bullhorn, JazzHR, Recruitee, Teamtailor, Indeed, plus 7,000+ apps via Zapier.

## Resources

- [Field Notes blog](https://www.hiretruffle.com/blog): essays on hiring in the AI age, from the team building Truffle.
- [Changelog](https://www.hiretruffle.com/changelog): dated entries for product, site, and trust updates. Canonical source for "what is new at Truffle."
- [Assessment library](https://www.hiretruffle.com/assessments): role-based skills and behavioral assessments.
- [Job description templates](https://www.hiretruffle.com/job-descriptions): editable templates for restaurant, healthcare, and retail roles.

## Trust & AI disclosures

- [AI for candidates](https://www.hiretruffle.com/trust/ai-for-candidates): plain-language explanation of how Truffle uses AI in candidate interviews, what we do not do (no facial analysis, no voice tone, no emotion inference, no biometric identifiers, no model training), candidate rights, and how to exercise them.

## Optional

- [Legal and policies](https://www.hiretruffle.com/legal)
